commit.message:
8490: Address review feedback - retype COUNT/INDEX/IDENTIFIER as Long, unify exception handling

- Retype COUNT, INDEX, IDENTIFIER from ContentType<Number> to ContentType<Long>
- Drop Comparable<T> bound on QuantityConversionException factory methods
- Use QuantityConversionException.unparsable() consistently across all persisters
- Revert unnecessary changes to CommonCellEditors, PersistableItemFilter, DataPageToolkit
- Add negative-path tests for malformed input on each persister
8490: Add missing throws declaration for QuantityConversionException
8490: Include numeric types without Persister in "Add Filter from Attribute" menu
